what-is-wemod.title: What Is WeMod?
what-is-wemod.description: WeMod is a desktop application that lets players enable cheats for PC games through a simple interface. Instead of manually running trainer files, users can launch a game directly from the app and toggle cheats with on-screen controls.
what-is-wemod.extended_description: It is commonly used as an alternative to standalone trainer tools, offering a more streamlined experience for players who want quick access to game enhancements.

wemod-features.title: WeMod Features for Crimson Desert
wemod-features.description: Depending on game support, WeMod may include the following features:
wemod-features.label: Available Features

items.title: Unlimited Health
items.description: Never worry about dying in combat

items.title: Unlimited Stamina
items.description: Run and fight without endurance limits

items.title: Money & Items
items.description: Edit your gold and inventory quantities

items.title: Game Speed
items.description: Control how fast time passes in the game

wemod-features.note: Features may vary depending on the game version and trainer compatibility.

how-to-use-wemod.title: How to Use WeMod with Crimson Desert
how-to-use-wemod.description: Follow these simple steps to get started with WeMod:

steps.title: Download and install the WeMod application
steps.description: Visit the official WeMod website and download the installer for Windows.

steps.title: Open WeMod and search for Crimson Desert
steps.description: Launch the app and use the search function to find Crimson Desert in your game library.

steps.title: Launch the game through WeMod
steps.description: Click the 'Play' button in WeMod to automatically start the game with cheat support.

steps.title: Enable cheats using the on-screen controls
steps.description: Use the simple toggle interface to activate the cheats you want while playing.

how-to-use-wemod.note: WeMod simplifies the process by removing the need for manual trainer setup and memorizing hotkeys.

comparison-table.title: WeMod vs Traditional Trainer
comparison-table.description: Compare the two approaches to choose the best option for your needs:

which-to-choose.title: Which One Should You Use?
which-to-choose.description: Choose the option that best fits your gaming style and technical comfort level.

choices.title: Choose WeMod If...
choices.description: You want a simple and guided experience. Ideal for beginners who want to enable cheats quickly without dealing with setup details or technical configurations.

choices.title: Choose Trainer If...
choices.description: You want more control, faster updates, or specific feature support. Better for experienced users who don't mind manual setup and want access to advanced customization options.

trainer-cta.title: Get a Compatible Trainer
trainer-cta.description: If you prefer a traditional trainer or need more advanced features, you can explore available trainer options and versions.

safety.title: Is WeMod Safe?
safety.description: WeMod is widely used, but like all tools that modify game memory, it may trigger antivirus warnings. Always download software from official sources and use it responsibly.

safety_tips.title: Only download from the official WeMod website
Avoid using cheats in online or competitive modes
Check compatibility with your current game version
Use at your own risk and follow game terms of service

safety.note: This site also provides traditional trainer alternatives for users who prefer standalone solutions.

faq.title: FAQs About WeMod
faq.description: Common questions about using WeMod with Crimson Desert.

items.question: Does WeMod work with Crimson Desert?
items.answer: Support depends on available trainer builds and compatibility with the current game version. Check the WeMod app for the latest game support information.

items.question: Is WeMod free to use?
items.answer: WeMod offers both free and premium features. Basic cheat functionality is typically available for free, with additional features available in the premium version.

items.question: Why is WeMod not working with my game?
items.answer: This can be caused by version mismatch after game updates, blocked permissions, or conflicts with other software. Try running both WeMod and the game as administrator.

items.question: Is WeMod better than a traditional trainer?
items.answer: It depends on your needs. WeMod is easier to use and better for beginners, while traditional trainers offer more flexibility and advanced features for experienced users.

items.question: Can I get banned for using WeMod?
items.answer: Using any cheat tool in online or competitive modes may result in bans. Only use these tools in offline single-player modes to be safe.

items.question: Where can I download a traditional trainer instead?
items.answer: You can find traditional trainer downloads and detailed guides on our dedicated download page for more advanced options.
